difficulty.reason: Big seeds easy to handle, fast visible growth, height measurement activity

growth_stages.name: Germination
growth_stages.look_for: Large seed leaves pushing up, seed shell may still be on top

prompt.en: The sunflower seeds you planted are waking up! Can you see them pushing through?
prompt.da: Solsikkefroene du plantede er ved at vaagne! Kan du se dem skyde op?

growth_stages.name: Rapid Growth
growth_stages.look_for: Stem growing taller each week, big heart-shaped leaves

prompt.en: Stand next to the ruler stake -- where does the top reach this week? Write it down!
prompt.da: Stil dig ved maalestokken -- hvor naar toppen hen til denne uge? Skriv det ned!

growth_stages.name: Flowering
growth_stages.look_for: Giant flower head opening, yellow petals around dark center

prompt.en: The sunflower is a bee restaurant! Sit and count how many bees visit in one minute!
prompt.da: Solsikken er en bi-restaurant! Sid og tael, hvor mange bier der kommer paa et minut!

growth_stages.name: Seed Development
growth_stages.look_for: Petals falling off, seed head drooping, seeds forming in the center

prompt.en: Cut the big head off and rub the seeds out with your thumb -- save some for next year!
prompt.da: Klip det store hoved af og gnub froene ud med din tommelfinger -- gem nogle til naeste aar!

human_readable.en: Water regularly during rapid growth. Deep roots are somewhat drought tolerant once established.
human_readable.da: Vand regelmaessigt under hurtig vaekst. Dybe roedder er noget toerketolerante naar de er etableret.

harvest.notes: Seeds: dry on stem, harvest head when petals fall. Save seeds for next year or roast them.

companion_plants.notes: Plant at north end of bed so they don't shade shorter plants.

message.en: Frost warning! Young sunflowers are sensitive -- cover with fleece!
message.da: Frostadvarsel! Unge solsikker er foelsomme -- daek med fiberdug!
